description.en: Manage general preferences such as display language.
description.zh-CN: 管理显示语言等通用偏好。

description.en: Choose the display language for this panel.
description.zh-CN: 选择面板的显示语言。

description.en: Configure instance-level structured log fields, error level, and safe rotation policies.
description.zh-CN: 配置实例级结构化日志字段、error level 和安全轮动策略。

logRootNotConfiguredDescription.en: Set NGINX_LOG_DIR and restart the runtime before applying log policies.
logRootNotConfiguredDescription.zh-CN: 设置 NGINX_LOG_DIR 并重启 runtime 后才能应用日志策略。

description.en: Core fields cannot be removed; optional fields are injected via a fixed Nginx variable whitelist and custom format strings are not accepted.
description.zh-CN: 核心字段不可移除；可选字段会通过固定 Nginx 变量白名单注入，不接受自定义 format 字符串。

description.en: Checked every 30 seconds after the size threshold is reached, using rename + Nginx reopen; retained count excludes the current file.
description.zh-CN: 达到大小阈值后每 30 秒检查一次，采用 rename + Nginx reopen，保留数量不含当前文件。

description.en: Active revision {{revision}}; will not change until the save task succeeds.
description.zh-CN: Active revision {{revision}}，保存任务成功前不会改变。

description.en: Check consistency between the active revision and the SQLite runtime projection.
description.zh-CN: 检查 Active revision 与 SQLite 运行投影的一致性。

description.en: On startup, validates consistency across the SQLite projection, manifest, config file set, checksums, and nginx -t.
description.zh-CN: 启动时对 SQLite 投影、manifest、配置文件集合、checksum 和 nginx -t 进行一致性校验。

healthy.en: The current Active revision matches the database source.
healthy.zh-CN: 当前 Active revision 与数据库来源一致。

description.en: Business paths use stable placeholders; the log root is shown as-is for migration diagnostics.
description.zh-CN: 业务路径使用稳定占位符；日志根目录因迁移诊断需要按原值显示。

historicalTitle.zh-CN: 检测到历史日志根目录

historicalDescription.en: The product only reads the current log root and does not migrate old logs automatically. Migrate manually before cleaning related revisions.
historicalDescription.zh-CN: 产品只读取当前日志根目录，不会自动迁移旧日志。请在清理相关 revision 前手动迁移。

description.en: Reads the actual server file in the current revision and verifies source and file checksums. Absolute sensitive paths are redacted.
description.zh-CN: 读取当前 revision 中的实际 server 文件，并核对 source 与文件 checksum。绝对敏感路径已脱敏。

selectHint.en: Select a published Domain to view the current runtime config.
selectHint.zh-CN: 选择一个已发布 Domain 查看当前运行配置。

description.en: Validates the mounted certificate expiry, SAN, and private-key match, then safely reloads Nginx.
description.zh-CN: 校验部署方挂载的证书有效期、SAN 与私钥匹配关系，再安全重新加载 Nginx。

notManaged.en: The current runtime mode does not manage TLS.
notManaged.zh-CN: 当前运行模式不管理 TLS。

title.zh-CN: 按 SQLite 重建 Active revision

description.en: Available only in degraded state. Rebuild does not create a Config Version and does not change any Domain's Active Version.
description.zh-CN: 只在 degraded 状态可用。重建不会创建 Config Version，也不会改变任何 Domain 的 Active Version。

passwordDescription.en: After confirmation, a candidate is fully generated from the trusted SQLite snapshot, then nginx -t, atomic activation, and reload are performed.
passwordDescription.zh-CN: 确认后将从受信任的 SQLite 快照全量生成 candidate，并执行 nginx -t、原子激活和 reload。

description.en: Manage least-privilege API tokens used for DNS-01 automated verification.
description.zh-CN: 管理 DNS-01 自动验证使用的最小权限 API Token。

description.en: The token is verified online first, then stored encrypted with AES-256-GCM; it is never displayed again after saving.
description.zh-CN: Token 会先在线验证，再使用 AES-256-GCM 加密保存；保存后不再回显。

guideTitle.en: Create a least-privilege Token in Cloudflare
guideTitle.zh-CN: 在 Cloudflare 创建最小权限 Token

guideStep1.en: Use the Edit zone DNS template, or create a Custom Token.
guideStep1.zh-CN: 使用 Edit zone DNS 模板，或创建 Custom Token。

guideStep2.en: Grant Zone / DNS / Edit and Zone / Zone / Read.
guideStep2.zh-CN: 授予 Zone / DNS / Edit 和 Zone / Zone / Read。

guideStep3.en: Zone Resources should include only Zones that need certificates.
guideStep3.zh-CN: Zone Resources 只包含需要签发证书的 Zone。

guideNote.en: The Account and Zone selected in Cloudflare are already written into the Token permission scope; Account ID does not need to be copied here. The Token secret is shown only once — paste and save it immediately after creation.
guideNote.zh-CN: Cloudflare 中选择的 Account 和 Zone 已写入 Token 权限范围；Account ID 无需复制到这里。Token secret 只显示一次，请创建后立即粘贴并保存。

tokenDescription.en: Requires Zone Read and DNS Edit permissions, and must cover the Zones of domains to be issued.
tokenDescription.zh-CN: 需要 Zone Read 与 DNS Edit 权限，且必须覆盖待签发域名的 Zone。

description.en: Manage admin password and active sessions.
description.zh-CN: 管理管理员密码与已登录会话。

passwordChanged.en: Admin password changed; other sessions have been revoked
passwordChanged.zh-CN: 管理员密码已修改，其他会话已撤销

sessionPolicySaved.zh-CN: 会话有效期策略已保存

description.en: Current password must be verified. After 3 consecutive failures, this operation is paused for 30 minutes for the same admin and Client IP.
description.zh-CN: 必须验证当前密码。连续失败 3 次后，同一管理员与 Client IP 将暂停此操作 30 分钟。

newPasswordDescription.en: At least 12 characters; the current browser session will be safely rotated after a successful change.
newPasswordDescription.zh-CN: 至少 12 个字符；修改成功后当前浏览器会话将安全轮换。

description.en: Controls the maximum lifetime of newly issued Sessions for normal login and when “Stay signed in” is checked.
description.zh-CN: 分别控制普通登录与勾选“保持登录”后新签发 Session 的最长有效时间。

standardDaysDescription.en: Used when the user does not check “Stay signed in”.
standardDaysDescription.zh-CN: 用户未勾选“保持登录”时使用。

rememberDaysDescription.en: Used when the user checks “Stay signed in”.
rememberDaysDescription.zh-CN: 用户勾选“保持登录”时使用。

note.en: The policy only affects Sessions issued after saving; existing Session expiry times are not extended or shortened.
note.zh-CN: 策略仅影响保存后新签发的 Session；现有 Session 的到期时间不会被延长或缩短。

description.en: Signs out the current browser session; other devices are unaffected.
description.zh-CN: 退出当前浏览器的登录会话，其他设备不受影响。

confirmDescription.en: The current browser session will be signed out and you will be redirected to the login page.
confirmDescription.zh-CN: 将退出当前浏览器会话并跳转到登录页。

description.en: Revokes this admin’s sessions on all browsers and devices, including the current session. Re-login is required afterward.
description.zh-CN: 撤销该管理员在所有浏览器和设备上的会话，包含当前会话。完成后需要重新登录。

confirmDescription.en: All signed-in devices will be invalidated immediately, and this page will redirect to the login page.
confirmDescription.zh-CN: 所有已登录设备会立即失效，当前页面将跳转到登录页。

description.en: View runtime paths, health status, and manage runtime artifacts capacity.
description.zh-CN: 查看运行路径、健康状态并管理 runtime artifacts 容量。

capacitySaved.en: Runtime artifacts capacity limit saved and cleanup completed
capacitySaved.zh-CN: Runtime artifacts 容量上限已保存并完成清理

capacityLockedDescription.en: Capacity or disk space precheck for the next publish did not pass. Raise the limit or free disk space before publishing.
capacityLockedDescription.zh-CN: 下一次发布的容量或磁盘空间预检未通过。请提高上限或释放磁盘空间后再发布。

description.en: Retention cleanup runs immediately after saving; Nginx is not reloaded.
description.zh-CN: 保存后立即执行 retention cleanup，不会 reload Nginx。

retainedRevisions.en: Retaining {{count}} revisions, of which {{protected}} are protected.
retainedRevisions.zh-CN: 保留 {{count}} 个 revision，其中 {{protected}} 个受保护。

capacityLimitDescription.en: Allowed range 512–20480 MiB. Protected revisions currently require at least {{min}}.
capacityLimitDescription.zh-CN: 允许范围 512–20480 MiB。受保护 revision 当前至少需要 {{min}}。

description.en: Provided by the current container and read-only deployment environment.
description.zh-CN: 由当前容器和只读部署环境提供。

description.en: Reflects the most recent runtime validation of the Active revision.
description.zh-CN: 反映 Active revision 的最近一次运行校验。
